raw_meta_yaml:
context:
  version: "0.26.0"

package:
  name: ironclaw
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://github.com/nearai/ironclaw/archive/refs/tags/ironclaw-v${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 329ecbe7aa7e171f639afc822ce24df5551f49e0986036c6fb3d7a29f208fea7

build:
  number: 0
  script:
    env:
      CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_STRIP: symbols
      CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_LTO: fat
    content:
      - if: win
        then:
          - set CARGO_HOME=C:\.cargo
      - if: linux and aarch64
        then:
          - export CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1
          - export CARGO_PROFILE_RELEASE_LTO=thin
      - if: unix
        then:
          - cargo auditable install --no-track --locked --root $PREFIX --path . --bin ironclaw
        else:
          - cargo auditable install --no-track --locked --root %LIBRARY_PREFIX% --path . --bin ironclaw
      - cargo-bundle-licenses --format yaml --output THIRDPARTY.yml
      - if: unix
        then:
          - mkdir -p $PREFIX/share/bash-completion/completions $PREFIX/share/zsh/site-functions $PREFIX/share/fish/vendor_completions.d
          - $PREFIX/bin/ironclaw completion --shell bash > $PREFIX/share/bash-completion/completions/ironclaw
          - $PREFIX/bin/ironclaw completion --shell zsh > $PREFIX/share/zsh/site-functions/_ironclaw
          - $PREFIX/bin/ironclaw completion --shell fish > $PREFIX/share/fish/vendor_completions.d/ironclaw.fish

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ compiler('rust') }}
    - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
    - cargo-bundle-licenses
    - cargo-auditable
    - python

tests:
  - script:
      - ironclaw --version
  - package_contents:
      bin:
        - ironclaw
      files:
        - if: unix
          then:
            - share/bash-completion/completions/ironclaw
            - share/zsh/site-functions/_ironclaw
            - share/fish/vendor_completions.d/ironclaw.fish
      strict: true

about:
  homepage: https://github.com/nearai/ironclaw
  summary: IronClaw is OpenClaw inspired implementation in Rust focused on privacy and security
  description: |
    IronClaw is OpenClaw inspired implementation in Rust focused on privacy and security
  license: MIT OR Apache-2.0
  license_file:
    - LICENSE-APACHE
    - LICENSE-MIT
    - THIRDPARTY.yml
  documentation: https://docs.ironclaw.com
  repository: https://github.com/nearai/ironclaw

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - yuikisaito

about.description: IronClaw is OpenClaw inspired implementation in Rust focused on privacy and security
about.summary: IronClaw is OpenClaw inspired implementation in Rust focused on privacy and security
